def positive_class_mixes_factory_parsing_persistence_and_presentation_roles():
    rule_id = "class_mixes_factory_parsing_persistence_and_presentation_roles"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag classes that combine unrelated lifecycle roles."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
